svg.font-family: 'Noto Sans TC', 'Heiti TC', 'Arial Unicode MS', 'Microsoft JhengHei', sans-serif

span.style: overflow: visible; color: rgb(0, 201, 201); font-weight: bold; font-size: 48px; width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; word-break: break-word; white-space: pre-wrap; text-align: center; place-content: center; align-items: center;

overflow: visible; color: rgb(23, 131, 255); font-weight: bold; font-size: 16px; width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; word-break: break-word; white-space: pre-wrap; text-align: center; place-content: center; align-items: center;
